name: Alation Data Intelligence API
what_it_does: Enterprise data intelligence and catalog platform with REST API — providing data catalog with curated metadata, data lineage, search and discovery, access governance, and policy management for enterprise data governance programs.
use_cases: Querying data catalog metadata (schemas, columns, data types) for governance workflows
Creating and managing data stewardship policies via API
Integrating Alation catalog metadata with data pipelines for lineage enrichment
Searching for datasets and understanding data quality scores via API
Synchronizing data dictionary entries from external sources via REST API
not_for: Lightweight data documentation (use dbt docs or Data World for simpler needs)
Data quality monitoring (use Bigeye or Monte Carlo for active monitoring)
best_when: A large enterprise needs comprehensive data governance with catalog, lineage, access policies, and stewardship workflows, especially in regulated industries.
avoid_when: You need lightweight catalog, are a small data team, or prioritize automated data quality over manual curation.

auth.notes: API token from Alation settings. Bearer token auth. User-level tokens inherit user permissions. Service account for programmatic access. No OAuth2 — token-based only. Webhook for catalog change events.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. US-based (Redwood City, CA). Founded 2012. Raised $340M+. Market leader in data catalog space. 500+ enterprise customers. Strong regulated industry adoption (financial services, healthcare). SOC2, ISO27001 certified.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for objects (articles, schemas, tables, columns), search, trust checks, and policies. Bearer token auth. Webhook for catalog events. Good developer documentation. Enterprise deployment — endpoint varies per customer. Object type hierarchy important for API navigation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Catalog object reads idempotent. Metadata updates idempotent by object ID. Policy creation idempotent. Article publishing creates new versions.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise deployment — API endpoint varies per customer instance
Object type hierarchy (article, schema, table, column) must be understood for navigation
Service account tokens recommended for programmatic access over user tokens
Lineage data may have delays as it's computed asynchronously

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and ISO27001 certified. HIPAA compliant. GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token with user permission inheritance. Enterprise security standards. Data governance platform handles sensitive metadata.
